title: The Forbidden Island
subtitle: How Albania learned to say no
summary: Albania's fight over Sazan and the Vjosa-Narta coast is more than an environmental protest. It is a country that once said yes to everything learning to defend the commons.
hero_caption: Flamingo double-headed eagle illustration. Image provided by author.

title: The Back Office of Reparations
subtitle: What €193 billion in a Belgian custody account tells us about European power
summary: Europe has frozen Russia's money but not quite made Russia pay. The fight over Euroclear shows how reparations have become a test of whether European power can move from moral claim to financial decision.
hero_caption: Euroclear headquarters in Brussels. Photo: Marek Śliwecki/Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0; cropped.

title: A Suez Without a Sequel
subtitle: Europe at Hormuz, and the missing treaty
summary: Spain, Italy and France refused America its bases for a strike on Iran. That refusal echoes 1956, but Suez built the EEC because the plans were already on the table. This time, there is no draft.
hero_caption: Signing ceremony of the Treaty of Rome at the Palazzo dei Conservatori, Rome (1957).
